acceptance_criteria.given: commands/dev.md and scripts/todo/dev.py after PR2 is applied
acceptance_criteria.then: A Bash-invocation block for graphify-query.py appears between Step 1 and Step 2 content (no '## Step 1.5' heading), referencing dev-registry/{task_id}/graphify/pre_query.json as output

acceptance_criteria.when: grep for 'Reference Resolution' and implicit reference word list
acceptance_criteria.then: agents/ba.md contains the 6-step Reference Resolution procedure and the list of implicit reference trigger words (之前/已有/现有/原来的/previous/existing/original)

Three new fail-gate conditions are present: (a) BA ignores structural_context.candidate_anchors FAIL, (b) BA has no Reference Resolution when implicit references detected FAIL, (c) BA only proves initial interpretation without counter-evidence FAIL

acceptance_criteria.given: agents/ba.md, agents/qa.md, and scripts/graphify_lib.py after PR1+PR2
acceptance_criteria.when: reading the failure handling documentation in all three files
acceptance_criteria.then: graphify tool failure is documented as advisory (never blocks DEV) AND requirement ambiguity is documented as clarification-blocking (BA returns needs_clarification)

acceptance_criteria.when: grep for 'graphify' in CP_AGENTS and ALLOWED_AGENTS
acceptance_criteria.then: 'graphify' appears in CP_AGENTS (pretool-cp-checkin.py) AND ALLOWED_AGENTS (spec-check.py); hooks/tests/test_cp_checkin.py has at least one test covering graphify registration

acceptance_criteria.given: all 32 files modified or created across PR1, PR2, PR3
acceptance_criteria.when: grep for decimal step headings ('## Step 1.5', '## Step 7.5', '### Step 1.5', '### Step 7.5')
acceptance_criteria.then: zero matches across all modified/created files
graphify_lib.py imports fcntl and uses fcntl.LOCK_EX on JSON file writes, mirroring the pattern at scripts/spec-check.py:171

acceptance_criteria.given: scripts/graphify-enrich.py after PR1 and no blast-radius-map.json on disk
acceptance_criteria.when: graphify-enrich.py is invoked with a task_id whose blast-radius-map.json does not exist
acceptance_criteria.then: graphify-enrich.py exits with status=skipped in graph-summary.json, zero exception, and DEV still receives a valid (empty) graph_context object

acceptance_criteria.when: reading the status state machine documentation/implementation
acceptance_criteria.then: All 5 states (ok, degraded, failed, unavailable, skipped) have documented triggering conditions; timeout produces status=failed; no state has an undefined trigger
graphify_lib.py defines EXCLUDE_FRAGMENTS tuple including .env, credentials, keys, logs, .git, venv patterns

acceptance_criteria.given: hooks/prompt-workflow.py after PR1 with GRAPHIFY_BIN absent or CLAUDE_GRAPHIFY_ENABLED=0
acceptance_criteria.then: graphify sentinel initialization is skipped entirely (no file write, no subprocess spawn); existing hook behavior is unaffected
